text: Fast delivery, usually within 30 minutes. App is easy to use. Restaurant selection is great. Fees have gone up a lot lately though.
Best delivery app. Food always arrives hot. Love the tracking feature. Support was helpful when an order was wrong.
Delivery speed is good but fees are getting ridiculous. Food quality varies by restaurant. App works well.
Huge restaurant selection. DoorDash has more options than Uber Eats in my area. Delivery is reliable. DashPass is worth it.
Too many fees. Support took forever to respond when my order was cold. Restaurant selection is good but delivery is slow.
Best selection. Fast delivery. App is intuitive. Customer support refunded me quickly when there was an issue.
Delivery was late. Food was cold. Support was unhelpful. Switched to DoorDash.
Decent selection. App feels outdated. Pricing is okay. Support is slow.
Good for local restaurants. Delivery speed varies. Food quality is usually fine. Fees are reasonable.
Fastest delivery in my area. Food always arrives hot. Support is responsive. Best app experience.
Great delivery speed. Good restaurant selection. App works well. Fees are a bit high.
Consistently fast. Best food quality preservation. Support helped when order was wrong.
Pricing is transparent. Fees are lower than competitors. Delivery can be slow. App is okay.
Good value for money. Wide selection. Support was helpful. App could be better.
Reliable delivery. App experience is smooth. Restaurant selection is excellent. Pricing is getting steep.
Best restaurant selection. Delivery speed is good. Support could be faster. Pricing is okay with DashPass.
Support is terrible. Delivery was 90 minutes late. Food was cold. Won't use again.
Fastest delivery. Food quality is best. Support is great. Slightly premium pricing.
Cheapest option. Delivery speed varies. Support is average. Good for budget orders.
